headline: Vulcan (VMC) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: James Thomas Hill: Thank you, Mark, and thank all of you for your interest in Vulcan Materials Company.  Both our safety and financial performance through the first half of the year has been outstanding, despite a challenging operating environment.  Margins have expanded 260 basis points, and aggregate cash gross profit per ton has grown 13%.
